PLAINTIFF ISABEL ANCELOVICI'S MOTION TO SUBMIT TARDY EXPERT WITNESS LIST.

APPEARANCES: Maiko Nakarai-Kanivas, Esq. 288-6341 & Alan S. Levins, Esq. 677-3156 of Littler Mendelson, P.C. for deft & opposing party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court's tentative ruling was hearing required. Defendant appeared, however there was no appearance by plaintiff & moving party at the hearing. The Court denied the motion. Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Not reported
